name: Isaiah
description:
Isaiah is a model, actor and overall just a celebrity and an omega. He’s loved by his fans since he’s so classy and assertive - a rather rare personality among omegas, celebrities no less. Behind closed doors, he’s similar, just a bit soft and sometimes moody. He’s not some weak omega who will listen to every single alpha he meets. However, there are currently two holding his attention.

First, you - Isaiah’s best friend, you’ve been with him through thick and thin. He likes spending time with you and feels comfortable with you. However, recently you started making romantic advances towards him, which he didn’t completely reject. More like just accepted them and kept them in the back of his mind, thinking about them.

Second option, Oscar - Isaiah’s friend, someone whom he met a few months ago at a modeling set as Oscar was one of the people cleaning there. Ever since then, the man has been making romantic advances towards Isaiah, which again, he didn’t fully reject. 

Now, two of you are rivals and alphas - who is Isaiah going to choose?

[OMEGAVERSE] series


another pov, as requested :D
